# Session info and results manifest

```{r results-manifest}
cache_files <- list.files(params$cache_dir, recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
result_files <- list.files(params$results_dir, recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
cat("Cached artefacts (", length(cache_files), "):\n", sep = "")
cat(paste(cache_files, collapse = "\n"), "\n")
cat("\nResult exports (", length(result_files), "):\n", sep = "")
cat(paste(result_files, collapse = "\n"), "\n")

# Ensure rstudio:rstudio ownership where missing.
Sys.chmod(c(cache_files, result_files), mode = "0664")
```

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
